readme.title: sebastiandotdev
readme.description: Personal portfolio and digital garden of Joan Sebastian García — a software developer from Colombia passionate about building beautiful, open-source tools.
readme.about_p1: This website serves as my personal portfolio, technical playground, and digital space where I share my work, projects, and thoughts on software development.
readme.about_p2: Built with care and attention to detail, following modern web standards and accessible design patterns.
readme.stack_nuxt: Full-stack Vue framework with SSR and file-based routing
readme.stack_unocss: Instant atomic CSS engine with Wind 4 preset
readme.stack_typescript: Strict type safety across the entire codebase
readme.stack_font: Monospaced typeface by Vercel for code aesthetics
readme.feature_1: Responsive, terminal-inspired navigation with CLI aesthetics
readme.feature_2: GitHub API integration for live project data
readme.inspirations_desc: This project draws inspiration from several outstanding developers and products:
readme.insp_projects: Visual layout and API patterns from
readme.insp_design: Portfolio base template and overall layout from
